requirement: Minimum 5 independent non-executive directors per Companies Act and IDC Articles
notes: Board has 6 independent NEDs. Board skills matrix reviewed annually. Two director vacancies filled in Q4 2024.

requirement: Annual financial statements submitted to Ministry of Finance within 90 days of year end
notes: FY2024 financial statements submitted on 10 March 2025, within the 90-day deadline. Unqualified audit opinion received.

requirement: Quarterly and annual results disclosure per LuSE and LSE listing requirements
notes: All quarterly results published on time. Annual report submitted within LuSE deadline. LSE disclosure obligations met.

requirement: Rehabilitation fund maintained at minimum 100% of estimated closure costs per ZEMA regulations
notes: Actuarial review indicates fund shortfall of approximately ZMW 570 million. Remediation plan submitted to ZEMA. Top-up contributions scheduled for Q2-Q4 2025.

requirement: Full compliance with all 45 ERB electricity licence conditions
notes: 42 of 45 licence conditions fully compliant. Three conditions relating to quality of service standards (SAIDI/SAIFI) partially compliant due to aging infrastructure. Improvement plan submitted to ERB.

requirement: Valid RTSA operating certificate with all Category A safety deficiencies resolved
notes: 5 of 12 Category A safety deficiencies from 2023 RTSA audit remain unresolved. RTSA has granted conditional extension pending resolution. ZRL engaging RTSA monthly on progress.

requirement: Capital Adequacy Ratio (CAR) minimum 10% per BoZ Banking and Financial Services Act
notes: CAR at 14.3% as at Q3 2024, well above the 10% minimum. Stress test results indicate CAR remains above 11% under severe scenario. BoZ satisfied with capital position.
